text:
オレは石橋を叩いて渡るタイプだから
あんな危ねえの相手にしてまで
経験を積もうなんて思わないよ。

強い敵ほど腕が鳴るとか？
そういうのオレには理解できないな……

もちろん、おたくが頑張るのをオレが
止める権利はないし、応援してるよ。

I'm a "measure like ten times, cut once" kinda
guy, ya know, pal? I'm not so thirsty for
experience I'd go take on a doozy like this.

What? You got a death wish or somethin'?
I'll never understand you wackos who go
hunt down the biggest, meanest enemies
on purpose.

But hey, who am I to hold you back, pal?
You just go have yourself a great time.
Go get 'em, pal! Go nuts out there!
